scripts.build: pnpm build:popup && pnpm package:chrome && pnpm package:firefox
scripts.package:chrome: rm -f tab-utils-chrome.zip && zip -r tab-utils-chrome.zip manifest.json background.js icon popup/build
scripts.package:firefox: rm -f tab-utils.xpi && zip -r tab-utils.xpi manifest.json background.js icon popup/build
